description_long: This is a blocky, stylized airplane with a predominantly white fuselage accented by dark brown and gray sections, reminiscent of a private jet or small commercial aircraft. The wings are mid-mounted and feature geometric patterns in blue, orange, and black, adding a decorative touch. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The airplane has multiple windows along the fuselage, suggesting a passenger configuration, and two visible engines mounted on the wings. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle type, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear at the front. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a row of windows indicating an enclosed, multi-seat arrangement.
description: A stylized, blocky white and brown airplane with mid-mounted patterned wings, a conventional tail, and visible engines under the wings. The fuselage features multiple windows and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, patterned left wing, and tail details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, and symmetrical wing and engine placement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the right wing's pattern and the airplane's overall length.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail structure, horizontal stabilizers, and the back of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings featuring geometric patterns and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units under the wings and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
